title.zh: Polkit CVE-2021-4034 PwnKit本地提权漏洞
title.en: Polkit CVE-2021-4034 PwnKit Local Privilege Escalation

description.zh: Qualys研究团队在polkit的pkexec中发现的内存损坏漏洞，允许非特权用户获取root权限。
description.en: Memory corruption vulnerability found by Qualys in polkit's pkexec, allowing unprivileged users to gain root privileges.

codeBlocks.code:
$ uname -a
Linux ubuntu 5.8.0-55-generic #62~20.04.1-Ubuntu SMP Wed Jun 2 08:55:04 UTC 2021 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux

$ pkexec --version
pkexec version 0.105

content.zh: 影响版本：polkit 0.105及之前版本，影响主流Linux发行版
content.en: Affected versions: polkit 0.105 and earlier, affects major Linux distributions

content.zh: EXP原理：编译payload.so共享库，创建GCONV_PATH=.目录和gconv-modules配置文件，利用pkexec的环境变量注入触发gconv执行
content.en: EXP principle: Compile payload.so shared library, create GCONV_PATH=. directory and gconv-modules config file, trigger gconv execution via pkexec environment variable injection

content.zh: 修复方案：chmod 0755 /usr/bin/pkexec 或升级到安全版本
content.en: Fix: chmod 0755 /usr/bin/pkexec or upgrade to secure version
